title: Anicko, vrat se!
actors: Anny Ondra, Theodor Pistek, Karel Lamac
plot: Peter the tramp (Karel Lamac) wants to end his life but he isn't successful in doing so. After his third attempt at suicide he jumps under a car but the owner and driver, Jirí Landa (Karel Lamac again), brakes in time. He notices ...
